## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`

## Risk Check

- [ ] No secrets, prompts, raw terminal logs, or private workspace data are persisted.
- [ ] Public API, protocol, CLI, or realtime contract changes are documented.
- [ ] Cross-platform behavior was considered for Linux, macOS, and Windows.
- [ ] User-facing behavior has a clear empty, loading, error, or stale-state path where applicable.
